name: r10h-orphan-period-cascade
rationale:
Broker correction email contains phrasing patterns that previously caused R5-C-a + R10-H sweep to produce '

..

' orphan-period cascade in the draft preview. Specifically: a sentence ending with internal-review-tail marker followed by leading-comma/period pattern. F4.SW sweep must consume the orphan period AND not leave trailing terminator. Tests the specific regex anchoring fix from R10-H bugfix cycle.
notes:
Two-event sequence — intake + correction containing the orphan-period-triggering phrasing. Assertion focus: draft preview HTML does NOT contain '

..

' artifact + does NOT contain dangling period.
